_comment: Hybrid sprite manifest - maps IDs to external sprite sheet paths. HybridSpriteLoader reads from 'sheets' key.

slash.notes: Body-only slash animation, no weapon. Compose with weapon_sheets/iron_sword/slash for full attack.

_previous_sdxl._fallback_note: Procedural cleric with extended anims (advance, defer, heal, raise, buff) still in cleric/

_design_source.generator: Procedural Lua/Aseprite (pixel-by-pixel, palette from Cleric design)
_design_source.palette_basis: Cleric Main design.aseprite palette, shifted to dark navy/charcoal hood, dusty purple scarf, dark brown leather
_design_source.notes: Gender-ambiguous, deep hood with eyes in shadow, dusty purple scarf, torn asymmetric cloak, empty hands (weapons composited at runtime)

bard._note: bard/ contains old 80x100 sprites for idle/walk/attack/hit/dead and new 256x256 for extended anims. Loader skips files it can't load.

iron_sword.notes: Separated weapon sprites for fighter iron sword. Compose over body animations.

slash.notes: Slash arc with trail effect. Frames: windup, peak, follow-through.

bronze_sword.notes: Bronze sword weapon sprites for early-game fighter.

flame_sword.notes: Flame sword weapon sprites with fire visual effects.

ice_blade.notes: Ice blade weapon sprites with frost visual effects.
